commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=dc0bc57e5f3040417b6fef90ddddbd491f53beb9)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes IRC nick-collision recovery to generate counted fallback nicks and retry up to 10 times per `connectIrcClient` call.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: Source-reproducible: current `connectIrcClient` scopes fallback recovery state to one client connection, matching the linked report's reset-across-reconnect claim. I did not run live ngircd/IRC reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The contributor needs to revise the patch and provide real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair an external PR while the proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(irc): prevent ghost nick loops on collision recovery
target.author: mar-zh

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
